title: Ruby Hall Clinic Digital Technologies is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Ruby Hall Clinic Digital Technologies is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Ruby Hall Clinic Digital Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Jabalpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Ruby Hall Clinic Digital Technologies:
Ruby Hall Clinic Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Medical Coding

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ruby Hall Clinic Digital Technologies!
